languages.text: "Не испытывай мое терпение, мон-кай. Или сложить осмысленную фразу из набора звуков — слишком сложная задача для примитивного рассудка?"
"Do not test my patience, mon-keigh. Unless forming a coherent sentence from a collection of sounds is a task too daunting for a mind as rudimentary as yours?"
languages.original_text: "Не испытывай мое терпение, мон-кай. Или сложить осмысленную фразу из набора звуков — слишком сложная задача для примитивного рассудка?"

traits.locale_text: "Do not test my patience, mon-keigh. Unless forming a coherent sentence from a collection of sounds is a task too daunting for a mind as rudimentary as yours?"

"Do not test my patience, mon-keigh. Unless forming a coherent sentence from a collection of sounds is a task too daunting for a mind as rudimentary as yours?"

languages.text: "Stellt meine Geduld nicht auf die Probe, Chem-Pan-Sey. Oder ist die Bildung eines verständlichen Satzes aus einer Sammlung von Lauten zu schwierig für Euren rudimentären Verstand?"
languages.original_text: "Do not test my patience, mon-keigh. Unless forming a coherent sentence from a collection of sounds is a task too daunting for a mind as rudimentary as yours?"

traits.locale_text: "Stellt meine Geduld nicht auf die Probe, Chem-Pan-Sey. Oder ist die Bildung eines verständlichen Satzes aus einer Sammlung von Lauten zu schwierig für Euren rudimentären Verstand?"

languages.text: « N'essayez pas d'éprouver ma patience, mon-keigh. À moins que la perspective de former une phrase cohérente soit une tâche trop complexe pour un esprit aussi primitif que le vôtre ? »
languages.original_text: "Do not test my patience, mon-keigh. Unless forming a coherent sentence from a collection of sounds is a task too daunting for a mind as rudimentary as yours?"

traits.locale_text: « N'essayez pas d'éprouver ma patience, mon-keigh. À moins que la perspective de former une phrase cohérente soit une tâche trop complexe pour un esprit aussi primitif que le vôtre ? »

languages.text: «No pongas a prueba mi paciencia, mon-keigh. ¿O es que formar una oración a partir de sonidos es una tarea demasiado intensa para tu rudimentaria mente?».
languages.original_text: "Do not test my patience, mon-keigh. Unless forming a coherent sentence from a collection of sounds is a task too daunting for a mind as rudimentary as yours?"

traits.locale_text: «No pongas a prueba mi paciencia, mon-keigh. ¿O es que formar una oración a partir de sonidos es una tarea demasiado intensa para tu rudimentaria mente?».

languages.text: "Sabrımı sınama mon-keigh. Yoksa ses koleksiyonundan tutarlı bir cümle çıkarmak, seninki kadar ilkel bir zihin için çok zor bir görev mi?"
languages.original_text: "Do not test my patience, mon-keigh. Unless forming a coherent sentence from a collection of sounds is a task too daunting for a mind as rudimentary as yours?"

traits.locale_text: "Sabrımı sınama mon-keigh. Yoksa ses koleksiyonundan tutarlı bir cümle çıkarmak, seninki kadar ilkel bir zihin için çok zor bir görev mi?"

languages.text: “不要考验我的耐心，猴子。还是说，把一串声音拼成完整的句子，对你那简陋的心智来说太难了？”
languages.original_text: "Do not test my patience, mon-keigh. Unless forming a coherent sentence from a collection of sounds is a task too daunting for a mind as rudimentary as yours?"

traits.locale_text: “不要考验我的耐心，猴子。还是说，把一串声音拼成完整的句子，对你那简陋的心智来说太难了？”

languages.text: 「私の忍耐を試すな、モンケイ。それとも、音の寄せ集めから筋の通った一文を組み立てることが、貴様ほど原始的な精神には荷が重すぎるとでも言うのか？」
languages.original_text: "Do not test my patience, mon-keigh. Unless forming a coherent sentence from a collection of sounds is a task too daunting for a mind as rudimentary as yours?"

traits.locale_text: 「私の忍耐を試すな、モンケイ。それとも、音の寄せ集めから筋の通った一文を組み立てることが、貴様ほど原始的な精神には荷が重すぎるとでも言うのか？」
